## Qualification Checklist

### Document Submission

- [ ] Supplier Qualification Questionnaire (SQQ) completed and received
- [ ] ISO 9001 certificate (or equivalent QMS evidence) received and valid
- [ ] Product data sheet / technical specification received
- [ ] Typical Certificate of Analysis (CoA) data (minimum 3 lots) received
- [ ] Material Safety Data Sheet (SDS/MSDS) received (for hazardous materials)
- [ ] Food-contact compliance declaration received (if applicable — food-contact materials)
- [ ] NAFDAC compliance letter received (if food-contact material)
- [ ] NESREA/environmental compliance declaration received (for chemicals/hazardous materials)
- [ ] Supplier Code of Conduct signed

### Quality Evaluation

- [ ] Product specifications reviewed and approved by Quality Manager
- [ ] Incoming material QC testing completed — Lot 1
- [ ] Incoming material QC testing completed — Lot 2
- [ ] Incoming material QC testing completed — Lot 3
- [ ] All 3 lots PASS QC testing (confirm spec compliance)
- [ ] Process trial run completed (material used in production trial)
- [ ] Production trial result: PASS / FAIL (circle)

### Commercial Evaluation

- [ ] Pricing proposal received and benchmarked
- [ ] Payment terms agreed
- [ ] Lead time confirmed: _______ days
- [ ] Safety stock requirement: _______ days
- [ ] Incoterms agreed (for import): _______
- [ ] NCS Form M requirements confirmed (for imports)
- [ ] SONCAP certificate arrangement confirmed (for regulated imports)

### Risk Assessment

| Risk | Level (H/M/L) | Mitigation |
|------|--------------|------------|
| Single-source dependency | | |
| Geographic / logistics risk | | |
| Currency / FX risk (import) | | |
| Lead time risk | | |
| Quality consistency risk | | |
| Regulatory/compliance risk | | |

| Quality Manager | | | Approve / Reject |
| Procurement Manager | | | Approve / Reject |
| Operations Manager | | | Approve / Reject |

**Final Decision:** ☐ Approved (add to approved supplier list)  ☐ Conditional approval  ☐ Rejected

**Conditions (if conditional approval):**
<!-- List any conditions that must be met before full approval -->

## MES / ERP Actions on Approval

- [ ] Supplier created in ERP supplier master (with tier classification)
- [ ] Material source list updated in ERP (link supplier to material code)
- [ ] Approved Supplier List (ASL) updated in MES
- [ ] Safety stock level set in ERP: _______ days / _______ kg
- [ ] Reorder point set in ERP
